---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run `hysa ...`
2. Select provider '...'
3. Type message '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add the terminal output or error messages.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 18.0, 20.0, 22.0]
- HYSA Code version: [e.g. 0.2.0]
- Terminal: [e.g. PowerShell, bash, zsh]

## Provider
Which provider were you using? (Ollama, OpenRouter, Groq, DeepSeek, Claude, GPT, Gemini)

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
